title: deyeuxia forsteri var. humilior
intro: Deyeuxia forsteri var. humilior, also known as a type of grass, is a plant species native to New Zealand, belonging to the Poaceae family. Traditionally, it has been used in Maori medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Deyeuxia forsteri var. humilior include reducing inflammation and promoting wound healing, as well as potentially exhibiting antimicrobial and antioxidant effects. In herbal preparations, the plant is typically dried and used in teas or infusions, although more research is needed to fully understand its effectiveness and potential side effects.
